issues.message: Change must have at least one delta. No deltas found. Ensure your change has a specs/ directory with capability folders (e.g. specs/http-server/spec.md) containing .md files that use delta headers (## ADDED/MODIFIED/REMOVED/RENAMED Requirements) and that each requirement includes at least one "#### Scenario:" block. Tip: run "openspec change show <change-id> --json --deltas-only" to inspect parsed deltas.
